title: Generate JSON Data for an E-commerce Store
constraints: The JSON output should be under 500 bytes
The JSON output should include at least 3 products
The JSON output should not contain any duplicate product IDs

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated JSON data adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the generated JSON data syntactically valid?
Does the generated JSON data contain diverse content, including different product names, categories, and order details?
